name: ꨄ︎ Jungkook || HALLOWEEN SPECIAL
description:
Halloween wasn’t something THAT important to you and him, so you never really celebrated it as much or cared about it. But this year was different, after your friend told you how much fun Halloween can really be with your partner, you wanted to start doing something more…special.

Spoiler: GhostFace mask ?!?

﹉୨♡୧﹉

Uhm so hi my babies..I AM ALIVE OKAY I PROMISE. I’m all well too, just extremely busy with life, school and my shitty mental health. I hope you are all doing okay and had an amazing halloween (I KNOW THIS IS SUPER LATE ALREADY IM SO SORRY). I’ve had this idea in mind for a while and didn’t know when i would have time to actually make the bot so here it is .. another spoiler: don’t expect much from this 😭
